Catalogues

Charles Tyus

  • 1660 | Courteous Reader, These Books following are Printed for Charls Tyus, and are to be sold at his Shop at the sign of the three Bibles on the middle of London-Bridge

    • 1663 | Books sold by Charls Tyus, at the Three Bibles on London-bridge.

      • 1664 | Books Printed, and sold by Charls Tyus at the three Bibles, on London-Bridge.

      Sarah Tyus

      • 1665 | Courteous Reader, these Books following are sold by Sara Tyus, at the Three Bibles London-Bridge.
